description: Style Note Plush upper with easy-peasy slip on styling, this classic loungewear pair is great if you're colour blocking or matching with your ensemble. Wear this sockless with rolled up denims for a fun vacay or a weekend getaway! Product Details Black leather upper with slip-on styling and stitch detail at the seams of the toe box Midfoot strap on the tongue Soft footbed, upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with patterned grooves Material and Care Leather Use a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
